UART Control Register

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x4
Size:
0x4

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:3] - - - -
[2] OVER8 rw 0x0 Oversampling mode
[1:0] SB rw 0x0 STOP bits

Field Descriptions

OVER8 - Oversampling mode

0: oversampling by 16; 1: oversampling by 8

SB - STOP bits

These bits are used for programming the stop bits: 00: 1 stop bit; 01: 0.5 stop bit; 10: 2 stop bits; 11: 1.5 stop bit

enum stop_bits
S10 0x0
S05 0x1
S20 0x2
S15 0x3
